---
title: "Venue & Travel"
title-block-banner: "#00000000"
title-block-banner-color: "white"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>

      #title-block-header.quarto-title-block.default .quarto-title-meta {
        color: #ffffff;
      }

      #title-block-header {
        background-image: url(images/Arran.jpg);
        background-size: cover;
        background-position-y: center;
        height: 200px;
      }

      .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner {
        height: 0;
      }
      
      .quarto-title-block .title {
        font-size: 3rem !important;
      }

      /* ── section utility ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
      
      .travel-link-card {
       border: 1px solid #ddd;
       border-radius: 8px;
       padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem;
       margin: 1rem 0;
       background: #f9f9f9;
      }
      .travel-link-card h3 { margin-top: 0; }

      .coming-soon {
        background: #f8f9fa;
        border: 2px dashed #ced4da;
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
        color: #6c757d;
        font-style: italic;
        margin-top: 0.5rem;
      }

      .coming-soon p {
        margin: 0;
      }

      /* hotel cards */

      .hotel-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
        gap: 1rem;
        margin-top: 1rem;
      }

      .hotel-card {
        border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
        background: #fff;
      }

      .hotel-card h4 {
        margin: 0 0 0.3rem 0;
        font-size: 1rem;
      }

      .hotel-card .badge {
        display: inline-block;
        font-size: 0.72rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        padding: 2px 8px;
        border-radius: 4px;
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      }
      

      .badge-west {
        background: #d4edda;
        color: #155724;
      }

      .badge-city {
        background: #cce5ff;
        color: #004085;
      }

      .hotel-card p {
        font-size: 0.88rem;
        color: #495057;
        margin: 0.3rem 0 0;
      }

      </style>
embed-resources: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

This page brings together practical information to help you plan your visit to Glasgow for the EnviBayes-INLA workshop. Sections marked *coming soon* will be updated as details are confirmed — check back closer to the event.

## 🏫 Venue Information {#venue}

The conference will take place on the Gilmorehill Campus of the University of Glasgow.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(leaflet)

leaflet() |>
  addProviderTiles("OpenStreetMap",
                   options = providerTileOptions(opacity = 0.5)) |>
  addMarkers(
    lng = -4.29273,
    lat = 55.87359,
    popup = "
    <b>🎤 Main Panel Session</b><br>
    Boyd Orr Building - LT 2
    "
  ) |>
  addMarkers(
    lng = -4.29338,
    lat = 55.8731,
    popup = "
    <b>☕️ Coffee & Poster sessions ch</b><br>
    Wolfson Medical School Building
    "
  ) |>
  addMarkers(
    lng = -4.294364935330928,
    lat = 55.8726330456895,
    popup = "
    <b>💻️ Tutorials </b><br>
    School of Maths & Stats
    "
  ) |>
  addMarkers(
    lng = -4.285,
    lat = 55.8724,
    popup = "
    <b>🥳️  Social Event </b><br>
    Glasgow University Union (GUU)
    "
  ) 

```

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
### Tutorials

**School of Maths & Stats**

- Pre-workshop [tutorials](workshops.qmd)
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### 🎤 Panel Sessions

**Boyd Orr Building - LT 2**

- Registration
- Keynote panel sessions
- Contributed talks
:::
:::::

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
### ☕ Coffee and Poster Sessions

**Wolfson Medical School Building**

- Poster Sessions
- Coffee and refreshments
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### 🥳 Social Event

**Glasgow University Union (GUU)**

- Join us for the workshop social event at the end of the conference
- Drinks, music, and informal networking
:::
:::::

::: coming-soon
Information about the welcome reception — including venue, timing, and dress code — will be added here closer to the event.
:::

## 🏨 Accommodation {#accommodation}

The University of Glasgow is situated in the **West End**, with a variety of small hotels and guest houses nearby, as well as easy links to City Centre hotels via the Subway.

The closest Subway station to the main University campus is **Hillhead**. For City Centre hotels, the closest stations are **Buchanan Street** and **St. Enoch**. The journey between the West End and City Centre takes around 10 minutes by Subway.

Delegates are advised to **book early** to guarantee availability at their preferred hotel.

{{< downloadthis AccommodationSheetUoG.pdf dname="Accomodation Glasgow" label="Download Accomodation details PDF" icon="database-fill-down" type="info" >}}

<!-- ### West End hotels (walking distance to campus) -->

<!-- ::::::::: hotel-grid -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Glasgow Grosvenor Hotel -->

<!-- ::: badge-west -->

<!-- West End -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Great Western Road, close to campus. [Book →](https://www.booking.com/hotel/gb/glasgowgrosvenor.en-gb.html) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Hotel Du Vin -->

<!-- ::: badge-west -->

<!-- West End -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Stylish boutique hotel in the West End. [Book →](https://www.hotelduvin.com/locations/glasgow/) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Leonardo Inn Glasgow West End -->

<!-- ::: badge-west -->

<!-- West End -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Comfortable, well-priced option near the university. [Book →](https://www.leonardohotels.co.uk/hotels/glasgow/leonardo-inn-glasgow-west-end) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- ::::::::: -->

<!-- ### City Centre hotels (\~10 min by Subway) -->

<!-- ::::::::::::::::::::::::: hotel-grid -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### DoubleTree by Hilton (Cowcaddens) -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Close to Cowcaddens station. [Book →](https://www.hilton.com/en/hotels/glasdidi-doubletree-glasgow-central/) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Carlton George -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Near Queen Street station. [Book →](https://www.carltonhotelcollection.com/carlton-george-hotel-glasgow/) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Premier Suites George Square -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Spacious apart-hotel by George Square. [Book →](https://www.premiersuites.com/locations/uk/glasgow/) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Native Glasgow -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Contemporary aparthotel near Buchanan Street. [Book →](https://www.nativeplaces.com/glasgow/) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### AC by Marriott (Buchanan Street) -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Modern hotel in the city centre. [Book →](https://www.marriott.com/en-gb/hotels/glabr-ac-hotel-glasgow/overview/) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Premier Inn St Enoch Square -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Good-value option right at St. Enoch. [Book →](https://www.premierinn.com/gb/en/hotels/scotland/strathclyde/glasgow/glasgow-city-centre-george-square.html) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Motel One -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Budget-friendly, central location. [Book →](https://www.motel-one.com/en/hotels/glasgow/) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Yotel Glasgow -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Compact, stylish rooms in the city centre. [Book →](https://www.yotel.com/en/hotels/yotel-glasgow) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Radisson Blu -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Full-service hotel near Argyle Street. [Book →](https://www.radissonhotels.com/en-us/hotels/radisson-blu-glasgow) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Leonardo Royal Hotel -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Large hotel close to the city centre. [Book →](https://www.leonardohotels.co.uk/hotels/glasgow/leonardo-royal-hotel-glasgow) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- :::: hotel-card -->

<!-- #### Clayton Hotel -->

<!-- ::: badge-city -->

<!-- City Centre -->

<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Modern hotel convenient for the Subway. [Book →](https://www.claytonhotels.com/glasgow/) -->

<!-- :::: -->

<!-- ::::::::::::::::::::::::: -->

## ✈️ Getting to Glasgow {#travel}

Guidance on arriving by air (Glasgow and Edinburgh airports), rail connections to Glasgow Central and Queen Street stations, and intercity coach services — via VisitGlasgow's official travel guide.

[View full travel guide →](https://www.visitglasgow.org.uk/convention-bureau/meeting-planners/travel/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

### 🛂 Visa Information {#visa}

Delegates travelling from outside the UK should check whether they need a visa or an Electronic Travel Authorisation (ETA) to attend. As of February 2026, most visa-exempt visitors (including from the EU, US, Canada, and Australia) now require an ETA before travelling — this is separate from a visa and is usually approved within a few days, but we recommend applying at least 2–3 weeks before travel. Check requirements via the [UK government's visa/ETA checker](https://www.gov.uk/check-uk-visa).

::: {.callout-note title="Invitation letter for visa application"}
If you require an official letter of invitation to support your visa or ETA application, please [get in touch with the organising committee](organiser.qmd) with your name, affiliation, and passport details as they appear on your travel documents.
:::

## 🚇 Exploring & Getting Around Glasgow {#getting-around}

Glasgow is a vibrant and compact city with plenty to offer delegates outside of conference sessions.

The city has a range of cultural attractions including the works of Charles Rennie Mackintosh and many museums and art galleries offering free entry.

If you’re extending your stay, Glasgow has excellent travel connections for exploring Scotland and an exciting selection of year-round tours leaving daily for the Scottish Highlands.

Delegates can look forward to a warm welcome in a city voted ‘world’s friendliest city’ by Rough Guides.

Plan your trip at: [visitglasgow.com](visitglasgow.com)

[Getting around guide →](https://www.visitglasgow.com/plan-your-trip/getting-here-and-around/getting-around?rsrc=peoplemakeglasgow.com){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

[Things to do →](https://www.visitglasgow.com/explore-by-interest/arts-museums-and-heritage?rsrc=peoplemakeglasgow.com){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

![](images/Royal Exchange Square.jpg){fig-align="center" width="521"}

## ♿ Accessibility & Sustainability {#accessibility}

Check the following guides for details on accessibility & Sustainability

[Accesability →](https://www.visitglasgow.org.uk/accessibility/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

[Sustainability →](https://www.visitglasgow.org.uk/convention-bureau/meeting-planners/where-meetings-mean-more/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

![](images/Kelvingrove.jpg){fig-align="center" width="521"}
